meaning: 塔伊兹[也门西南部城市]
examples: The signaling in a plant is only superficially similar to the firing in a complex animal brain, which is more than "a mass of cells that communicate by electricity," Taiz said.
At least one person was killed in the city of Taiz.
The whole world is watching this happen to us in Taiz.
Aziza Othman was murdered in Taiz during an attack at a peaceful and unarmed protest by women.
An American teacher was fatally shot in the province of Taiz earlier this month, Yemeni Defense Ministry officials said.
